ab: Samaanen iso a tayra i talo’an.
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Pakapalidingay kako a tayra i talo’an.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Samaanen ningra a tayra i ising?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Rakat sanay tayra i ising cingra.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Samaanen ningra a tayra i pokoto?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Pakahikokiay tayra i Pokoto kako.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Samaanen iso a tayra i Pokoto?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Pakataminaay tayra i Pokoto kako.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Samaanen iso a minokay?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Pakacieying kako minokay.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Samaanen niLapic a tayra i kongkoan?
en: How does Lapic go to school?

ab: Pakakasolingay tayra i kongkoan ciLapic.
en: Lapic goes to school by train.

ab: Samaanen niSawmah a tayra i kiwkay?
en: How does Saomah go to church?

ab: Pakatingsaay tayra i kiwkay ciSaomah.
en: Saomah goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Pakacieying a mitilid kiso?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Cowa, pakapasoay mitilid kako.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Pakatingsaay a mitilid kiso?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Hai, pakatingsaay a mitilid kako.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: PakaKawti’ay kiso a tayra iTakaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Hai, PakaKawti’ay kako a tayra iTakaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: O kasoling anca o hikoki ko nikalican iso a tayra i Posong?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: O hikoki ko nikalican ako, kaliki ko hikoki to kasoling.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: O paso anca parakatay kiso to paliding a tayra i kiwkay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Tayra i kiwkay parakatay to paliding kako, madepoc a parakat to paliding to paso.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: O ciyn ciya a patiyamay mingataay to loma’ namo?
en: Is the FamilyMart to your house?

ab: Cowa ka ngata, pakaotopay sanay tayra i ciyn ciya a patiyamay kako.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去全家。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the FamilyMart.

ab: Mangataay no Yofing ko kongkoan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Mangataay, rakat sa tahira to.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Mangataay no ciyataw ko kakomaenan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Lima a fon ko karomakat tahira to i ciyataw.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
